title: Fit For The Job Decorators Cork Hand Sanding Block For Better Grip, Extra Force and More Comfortable Working With Sandpaper, Wet & Dry, Aluminium Oxide And Other Abrasive Paper Sheets
features: This cork sanding block is ideal for hand sanding with your choice of abrasive paper sheet or roll including sandpaper, wet & dry, aluminium oxide and finishing paper
Because you can grip it, sanding with a block is more comfortable than sanding with paper alone, so it's less harsh on your hands and wrists, especially if you've got a lot of sanding to do
Made from high density compressed cork that doesn't swell or disintegrate when used with wet papers - even when submerged in water - and will last for many sanding jobs
Flat sides give uniform pressure and eliminate uneven sanding for a consistent surface profile, with bevelled edges so the block won't tear or rip papers
Incredibly easy to use: simply cut your choice of abrasive paper to wrap around the block The high friction cork ensures no paper slippage or movement when you're sanding for fast, efficient working
11cm x 6cm (4" x 25" approx) block size fits neatly into the palm of your hand
description: From the manufacturer Foam Sanding Blocks Trade quality abrasive sanding blocks are coated with high quality aluminium oxide abrasive that significantly outlasts sandpaper - the grains are self-sharpening for better durability and clog less to maximise your productivity Multi Purpose Sandpaper Fine grade sandpaper gives a smooth, professional finish and is ideal for final sanding prior to applying a first coat of paint or varnish to wood, smoothing surface imperfections on wood or metal and removing texture on plaster and fillers. Medium grade sandpaper is ideal for removing varnish, smoothing surface imperfections and sanding of bare wood to prepare it before painting. Coarse grade is ideal for sanding rough sawn wood, rapidly removing previous coatings, wiping away a layer of debris with minimal effort and shaping or rounding edges. Clog Resistant Contour Sanding Pads Ideal for sanding a wide range of surfaces, these flexible sanding pads are an superior alternative to sandpaper: they don't crack, clog at a much slower rate and are ideal for flat and curved surfaces alike. Foam Sanding Blocks Foam Sanding Block avalible is assorted grits. Sanding Sponges are Flexible, Reusable and Washable. They can be used Wet & Dry and are suitable for Sanding Wood, Metal, Walls, Plaster 5, 10 and 25 Packs Multi-purpose sandpaper is ideal for a wide range of general purpose hand sanding tasks including furniture restoration, sanding decorative mouldings and general wood, metal or plaster ready for painting, priming, undercoating, staining or varnishing. Available in Fine, Medium, course and an assorted pack Clog Resistant Contour Sanding Pads 5 pack Clog Resistant Contour Sanding Pads For Sanding Pipes & Curved or Moulded Wood & Metal Surfaces Removing Paint & Varnish Before Applying Primer, Lacquer or Finishing Coat Mixed Grades Wire Wool Handy mixed grade pack of high quality steel wool covers a wide range of general purpose preparation and maintenance work including cleaning, degreasing and surface preparation for painting. It includes 30g rolls of each of fine, medium and coarse grades - ideal for DIY projects and maintenance jobs.
